## 🐛 Bug Description
A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Run `python src/build_all.py`
2. Open chart `XX_name.py`
3. See error

## Expected Behaviour
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behaviour
What actually happened. Paste the full error traceback here:

```
paste traceback here
```

## Environment
- OS: [e.g. Ubuntu 22.04 / macOS 14 / Windows 11]
- Python version: [e.g. 3.11.5]
- Matplotlib version: [e.g. 3.8.2]
- Seaborn version: [e.g. 0.13.0]

## Screenshots
If applicable, attach chart images or screenshots.
